description: M21 ITC'02-derived innovation pressure case. It preserves the M10 workload/topology mapping but adds shared BIST engines, constrained FPP bandwidth, and stronger thermal RC parameters to expose path-schedule and topology effects.
provenance_notes: ITC'02 p34392.soc provides selected module I/O, scan-chain lengths, and pattern counts.
UCIe/Open3DBench public values motivate link/topology abstractions but do not define IEEE 1838 FPP internals.
IEEE 1838 bit widths, DWR lengths, per-phase power, and thermal proxy parameters are model assumptions.
Derived from m10_large_p34392_3d_stack; this is a controlled pressure benchmark, not a new public chip.
Shared BIST engines and thermal RC amplification are experimental stress assumptions.

experimental_controls.m21_pressure_intent: make individually fastest BIST paths conflict on shared engines while FPP remains a viable concurrent alternative
